# Fursay

Fursay is a parent-child bilingual story platform for young families. The site helps parents choose one short story, try one phrase together, and receive a weekly story pack by email.

Primary site:
- https://fursay.com/

Localized home pages:
- English: https://fursay.com/
- Traditional Chinese: https://fursay.com/zh/
- Arabic: https://fursay.com/ar/

Story worlds:
- Koko's Forest Adventure: English-Chinese stories for Mandarin-speaking families, ages 2-8.
  - Site: https://fursay.com/koko
  - Traditional Chinese: https://fursay.com/zh/koko
  - Arabic: https://fursay.com/ar/koko
  - YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@KokosForest
- Arabic Kids Chinese Picture Book: Arabic-Chinese stories with Pinyin support for Arabic-speaking families, ages 3-6.
  - Site: https://fursay.com/arabic
  - Traditional Chinese: https://fursay.com/zh/arabic
  - Arabic: https://fursay.com/ar/arabic
  - YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ArabicKidsChinese

Episode landing pages:
- Koko feelings story pack: https://fursay.com/episodes/koko-feelings
  - Traditional Chinese: https://fursay.com/zh/episodes/koko-feelings
  - Arabic: https://fursay.com/ar/episodes/koko-feelings
- Nour colors story pack: https://fursay.com/episodes/noor-colors
  - Traditional Chinese: https://fursay.com/zh/episodes/noor-colors
  - Arabic: https://fursay.com/ar/episodes/noor-colors
- Nour greetings story pack: https://fursay.com/episodes/noor-greetings
  - Traditional Chinese: https://fursay.com/zh/episodes/noor-greetings
  - Arabic: https://fursay.com/ar/episodes/noor-greetings

Family actions:
- Choose a story world from the home page.
- Watch one free story on YouTube.
- Subscribe to the Koko or Nour weekly story pack.
- Join Koko's weekly English story pack: https://fursay.com/join/koko
- Join Nour's weekly Chinese story pack: https://fursay.com/join/noor
- Preview Koko's sample story pack: https://fursay.com/sample/koko
- Preview Nour's sample story pack: https://fursay.com/sample/noor
- Social profile story-pack chooser: https://fursay.com/links
- Share Koko's family sample link: https://fursay.com/share/koko
- Share Nour's family sample link: https://fursay.com/share/noor
- Koko social profile bio link: https://fursay.com/bio/koko
- Nour social profile bio link: https://fursay.com/bio/noor
- Social profile links page: https://fursay.com/links
- Product waitlist page for families: https://fursay.com/products
- Traditional Chinese product waitlist page for families: https://fursay.com/zh/products
- Arabic product waitlist page for families: https://fursay.com/ar/products
- Koko printable presale-preparation page: https://fursay.com/products/koko-printable
  - Traditional Chinese: https://fursay.com/zh/products/koko-printable
  - Arabic: https://fursay.com/ar/products/koko-printable
- Nour worksheet presale-preparation page: https://fursay.com/products/noor-worksheet
  - Traditional Chinese: https://fursay.com/zh/products/noor-worksheet
  - Arabic: https://fursay.com/ar/products/noor-worksheet
- Privacy: https://fursay.com/privacy
  - Traditional Chinese: https://fursay.com/zh/privacy
  - Arabic: https://fursay.com/ar/privacy
- Support: https://fursay.com/support
  - Traditional Chinese: https://fursay.com/zh/support
  - Arabic: https://fursay.com/ar/support
- Koko printable sample preview: https://fursay.com/product-samples/koko-printable
- Nour worksheet sample preview: https://fursay.com/product-samples/noor-worksheet

Creator and sharing references:
- Creator link for Koko descriptions: https://fursay.com/creator/koko
- Creator link for Nour descriptions: https://fursay.com/creator/noor
- Koko YouTube creator link: https://fursay.com/creator/koko/youtube
- Koko social creator link: https://fursay.com/creator/koko/social
- Koko newsletter creator link: https://fursay.com/creator/koko/newsletter
- Nour YouTube creator link: https://fursay.com/creator/noor/youtube
- Nour social creator link: https://fursay.com/creator/noor/social
- Nour newsletter creator link: https://fursay.com/creator/noor/newsletter
- Family share kit page: https://fursay.com/share-kit
- Creator kit page: https://fursay.com/creator-kit

Operator and validation references:
- These pages are for launch, QA, growth, and monetization validation. They are noindex or machine-readable references, not the primary family entry points.
- Traffic launch kit page: https://fursay.com/traffic-launch
- Nour sprint status page: https://fursay.com/noor-sprint-status
- Nour sprint next action manifest: https://fursay.com/noor-sprint-action.json
- Deploy readiness page: https://fursay.com/deploy-readiness
- Conversion health dashboard: https://fursay.com/conversion-health
- Monetization roadmap: https://fursay.com/monetization-roadmap
- Product interest manifest: https://fursay.com/products.json
- Monetization roadmap manifest: https://fursay.com/monetization-roadmap.json
- Shortlink manifest: https://fursay.com/shortlinks.json
- Video discovery manifest: https://fursay.com/video-discovery.json

Commerce and affiliate policy:
- Traditional Chinese pages use Books.com.tw affiliate links only: https://fursay.com/zh/, https://fursay.com/zh/koko, https://fursay.com/zh/arabic, https://fursay.com/zh/episodes/koko-feelings, https://fursay.com/zh/episodes/noor-colors, https://fursay.com/zh/episodes/noor-greetings
- Books.com.tw affiliate ID: arthur0858
- Current expected Books.com.tw affiliate links: 18
- English and Arabic pages use Amazon affiliate links only: https://fursay.com/, https://fursay.com/koko, https://fursay.com/arabic, https://fursay.com/episodes/koko-feelings, https://fursay.com/episodes/noor-colors, https://fursay.com/episodes/noor-greetings, https://fursay.com/ar/, https://fursay.com/ar/koko, https://fursay.com/ar/arabic, https://fursay.com/ar/episodes/koko-feelings, https://fursay.com/ar/episodes/noor-colors, https://fursay.com/ar/episodes/noor-greetings
- Amazon Associates Store ID: parenttechche-20
- Current expected Amazon affiliate links: 37
- Affiliate click tracking is expected on all 18 public story and episode pages.
- Anonymous conversion events post to /api/event and write to Worker logs until the Cloudflare account enables Analytics Engine; the planned binding is FURSAY_EVENTS for dataset fursay_events, with no PII fields.
- Event reporting path: npm run report:events writes /tmp/fursay-event-analytics-report/event-analytics-report.json and queries 7-day and 30-day Analytics Engine summaries after dashboard enablement and Cloudflare query credentials are available.
- Owned products are family-facing waitlists only: Koko printable story pack and Nour 3-minute worksheet pack. Families can join interest lists and receive the free story pack first; paid access is not open and no payment is collected on the product page.
- Event analytics must not include email, name, phone, address, token, password, or subscriber payload fields.

Technical discovery:
- Sitemap: https://fursay.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://fursay.com/robots.txt

- Social profile links manifest: https://fursay.com/links.json
- Conversion health dashboard: https://fursay.com/conversion-health
- Conversion health manifest: https://fursay.com/conversion-health.json
- Monetization roadmap: https://fursay.com/monetization-roadmap
- Monetization roadmap manifest: https://fursay.com/monetization-roadmap.json
- Product waitlist page for families: https://fursay.com/products
- Traditional Chinese product waitlist page for families: https://fursay.com/zh/products
- Arabic product waitlist page for families: https://fursay.com/ar/products
- Koko printable sample preview: https://fursay.com/product-samples/koko-printable
- Nour worksheet sample preview: https://fursay.com/product-samples/noor-worksheet
- Product interest manifest: https://fursay.com/products.json
- Shortlinks: https://fursay.com/shortlinks.json
- Deploy readiness gate: npm run deploy:ready
- Local release gate: npm run check
- Cloudflare deploy command: npm run deploy
